nasb.text: When Abigail saw David, she hurried and dismounted from her donkey, and fell on her face before David and bowed herself to the ground.

esv.text: When Abigail saw David, she hurried and got down from the donkey and fell before David on her face and bowed to the ground.

cnv.text: 亞比該見了大衛，就急忙從驢背下來，俯伏在大衛面前，臉伏於地，向他叩拜。

ccb.text: 亚比该看见大卫，连忙下驴俯伏下拜。
